articles.title: Pentagon approves first autonomous vehicle deal for Marine Corps
articles.description: Overland AI won a Marine Corps production contract to deliver autonomous ground vehicles for the MADIS air defense program by early 2027.
articles.content: Overland AI has secured a $19.7 million production agreement with the U.S. Marine Corps to supply autonomous ground vehicles for the Marine Air Defense Integrated System (MADIS), marking a significant step toward deploying fully autonomous vehicles i... [3314 chars]

articles.title: Google Drive’s Ask Gemini and AI Overviews come to Android
articles.description: After debuting on the web earlier this year, Google Drive is bringing Ask Gemini and AI Overviews to mobile.
articles.content:
After debuting on the web earlier this year, Google Drive is bringing Ask Gemini and AI Overviews to mobile.

articles.title: US must innovate faster to counter China’s tech rise, lawmakers told
articles.description: Witnesses urge investment in AI, robotics and chips, warning US research cuts risk eroding America’s technological edge.
articles.content: A US congressional hearing on Tuesday urged the United States to innovate faster, smarter and better to counter China’s growing technological muscle, even as several lawmakers slammed the US President Donald Trump administration for policies they sai... [932 chars]

articles.title: U.S. Eases Export Controls on Fable 5 AI: A New Era for Anthropic
articles.description: The U.S. Commerce Department plans to lift export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model, as reported by Politico. A senior White House official confirmed the decision, marking a significant policy shift. This move could potentially expand the global market reach for Anthropic's groundbreaking AI technology.
articles.content:
The U.S. Commerce Department is set to lift export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI model, according to a report by Politico. A senior White House official confirmed the anticipated policy change, which is scheduled for implementation on Tuesday.

articles.title: Jim Cramer says the AI trade has shifted - and these stocks are leading now
articles.description: CNBC's Jim Cramer said Wall Street is rewarding the companies supplying the artificial intelligence boom rather than the technology giants funding it.
articles.content:
CNBC's Jim Cramer on Tuesday offered up a straightforward framework for Wall Street's current approach to the artificial intelligence trade.

articles.title: Many Analysts Expected AI To Replace Workers. New Company Data Tells A Different Story.
articles.description: Businesses making the largest investments in artificial intelligence expanded their workforces faster than comparable companies after adopting the technology, according to new research.
articles.content:
Businesses making the largest investments in artificial intelligence expanded their workforces faster than comparable companies after adopting the technology, according to new research released Tuesday.

articles.description: The streamer said it received the consent of the late actor’s estate for its new competition series, which will debut in September.
